data.name: ButtonCreate
data.comment: The text in a button to create a user, i.e. "Create".

data.name: HeadingCreateUserFirstTimeSetup
data.comment: A heading in the create user window, i.e. "First Time Setup".

data.name: ToolTipEmail
data.value: Not used for sending emails. It's an identifier for your local profile in the software and for sharing with others.
data.comment: A tool tip text explaining that entering an email is only a convient format to name or tag a user, it's not used to send emails.

data.name: WatermarkEmail
data.comment: The text used as watermark (slightly transparent grey) in a email entry text box, i.e. "Email".

data.name: PlaceholderLoading
data.comment: A text shown as a placeholder when loading things takes time in a window, i.e. "Loading...".

data.name: ToolTipMasterPassword
data.value: Your master password. Make it strong, write it down and keep it safe.
data.comment: A tool tip text explaining briefly about the master password, that it should be strong and kept safe.

data.name: MenuAbout
data.comment: The text in the menu to open a window with about information, i.e. "About". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: MenuDecrypt
data.comment: The text in the menu to open a dialog to select files to decrypt, i.e. "Decrypt...". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: MenuEncrypt
data.comment: The text in the menu to open a dialog to select files to encrypt, i.e. "Encrypt...". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: MenuExit
data.comment: The text in the menu to exit the program, i.e. "Exit". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: MenuFile
data.comment: The text in the menu to open the file submenu, i.e. "File". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: MenuHelp
data.comment: The text in the menu open the help submenu, i.e. "Help". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: MenuOpen
data.comment: The text in the menu to open a dialog to select a file to open, i.e. "Open...". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: WatermarkPassword
data.comment: The text used as watermark (slightly transparent grey) in a password entry text box, i.e. "Master Password".

data.name: WatermarkConfirmPassword
data.comment: The text used as watermark (slightly transparent grey) in a password confirmation entry text box, i.e. "Confirm Password".

data.name: ZzTitleAboutFormat
data.comment: Window title for About dialog. {0} is the full program version name, i.e. "Xecrets Ez 2.1.1337.0".

data.name: ZzLabelCliToolApiVersionFormat
data.comment: CLI API version label in about box, {0} is the tools display name, followed by the version, i.e. "Command Line Tools API Version:" 1.2

data.name: ZzLabelCliToolInformationFormat
data.comment: CLI information label in about box, {0} is the tools display name, followed by some information, i.e. "Command Line Tools Information:" ...Splash from CLI.

data.name: ZzLabelCliToolPathFormat
data.comment: CLI path label in about box, {0} is the tools display name, followed by a path, i.e. "Command Line Tools Path:" ...

data.name: ZzLabelSdkApiVersionFormat
data.comment: The SDK API Version label in about box, {0} is the SDK API display name, i.e. "SDK API Version:" 1.3.

data.name: ZzHeadingSignInFormat
data.comment: A heading in the sign in window, {0} is the program name, i.e. "Xecrets Ez".

data.name: ZzTitleProgramVersionNameFormat
data.comment: Program version window title format string, {0} is the actual version, i.e. "2.1.1337.0", {1} is the program name, i.e. "Xecrets Ez", {2} is the email of the signed in user, or empty.

data.name: ButtonCancel
data.comment: The text in a button that causes an action to be canceled, i.e. "Cancel".

data.name: ButtonOk
data.comment: The text in a button that says 'OK', i.e. "Ok".

data.name: DialogTextAllFiles
data.comment: A text used in a file selection dialog for the file pattern '*'.

data.name: DialogTextDowngradedVersionWarning
data.value: You seem to have downgraded to an older version. This can happen if multiple versions are installed. Do you really want to continue with this version?
data.comment: Warning shown at startup when this executable version appears older than the most recently used version, asking whether to continue.

data.name: DialogTextEncryptedFiles
data.comment: A text used in a file selection dialog for the file pattern '*.axx'.

data.name: DialogValidationConfirmPassword
data.comment: An error text displayed when no password confirmation was entered.

data.name: DialogValidationInvalidEmail
data.value: Please enter a valid email address
data.comment: An error text displayed when validation of email format fails.

data.name: DialogValidationPasswordRequired
data.comment: An error text displayed when no password is entered although required.

data.name: DialogTitleSelectFilesToDecrypt
data.comment: The title of a file selection dialog for selecting files to decrypt, i.e. 'Select files to decrypt'.

data.name: DialogTitleSelectFilesToEncrypt
data.comment: The title of a file selection dialog for selecting files to encrypt, i.e. 'Select files to encrypt'.

data.name: DialogTitleSelectFileToOpen
data.comment: The title of a file selection dialog for selecting a file to open, i.e. 'Select files to open'.

data.name: MenuClose
data.comment: The text in the menu to close all possible currently opened files. (_ indicates the letter for a keyboard accelerator)

data.name: DialogValidationWrongPassword
data.comment: An error message displayed in a dialog when the users enters the wrong password.

data.name: DialogTextDropOrPasteTitle
data.comment: Text for the middle of the window, where files can be dropped or pasted. Not all OS's support drag and drop.

data.name: DialogTextDropOrPasteToolTip
data.value: Drop or paste files here to encrypt or decrypt them. Use keyboard {0} button to decrypt a single file, otherwise it opens.
data.comment: The tooltip for the paste and drag and drop area, giving a little bit more information. Not all OS's support drag and drop.

data.name: MenuEdit
data.comment: The text in a menu for the Edit operation, i.e. "Edit"

data.name: MenuPaste
data.comment: The text in a menu or context menu for the Paste operation, i.e. Paste.

data.name: MenuShow
data.comment: Text for a menu entry to show the program from a minimized state.

data.name: ZzCommandBarContentFilesOpenFormat
data.value: No open files|One open file...|{0} Open files...
data.comment: Status text for number of files currently open, {0} is the number of files. Singular version|Plural version

data.name: ButtonNo
data.comment: The text in a button that causes a 'No'-response, i.e. "No".

data.name: ButtonYes
data.comment: The text in a button that causes a 'Yes'-response, i.e. "Yes".

data.name: LicensedBlurb
data.value: License for {licensee} valid to {expiration}, thank you!
data.comment: A text fragment appearing in the about window, informing that there is a currently valid license.

data.name: LicensedExpiredBlurb
data.value: License for {licensee} expired at {expiration}.\nFree version, some features unavailable.\nSee https://www.axantum.com/ .
data.comment: A text fragment appearing in the about window, informing that there is a previously valid license, now expired.

data.name: LicenseNotValidForProductBlurb
data.value: License '{product}' for {licensee} is not valid for this software. Free version, some features unavailable.\nSee https://www.axantum.com/ .
data.comment: A text fragment appearing in the about window, informing that the license is not valid for Ez.

data.name: UnlicensedBlurb
data.value:
Free version, some features are unavailable.
Please buy a license. See https://www.axantum.com/ .
data.comment: A text fragment appearing in the about window, informing that there is no license.

data.name: BannerUnlicensedWarning
data.comment: The warning text displayed in the main window when the program does not have a valid license.

data.name: DialogTextTooLargeForLicense
data.value: File(s) were not encrypted. Encryption limit is 1 MB. See About.
data.comment: Informing that one or more files could not be encrypted due to licensing restrictions. A list of files may be appended.

data.name: ToolTipDecreaseScaleFactor
data.comment: A tool tip text explaining the function of the scale factor decrease button.

data.name: ToolTipIncreaseScaleFactor
data.comment: A tool tip text explaining the function of the scale factor increase button.

data.name: InvalidLicenseIgnored
data.comment: A text used to issue a warning to the user that an attempt was made to add an invalid or expired license.

data.name: DialogTextUnknownPassword
data.value: File(s) could not be decrypted. Try adding an alternative password.
data.comment: The text shown when a decryption fails because of unknown password.

data.name: MenuAddPassword
data.comment: The menu item under to add an extra alternate password.

data.name: DialogTextAddPassword
data.comment: The text displayed as heading in the dialog to enter an extra alternate password.

data.name: DialogTextOpenFailed
data.comment: Text displayed when for some unknown and unspecified reason a file was not properly decrypted and opened.

data.name: DialogLabelCurrentDirectory
data.comment: The About Window label for the info about the current directory.

data.name: DialogLabelStartCommand
data.comment: The About Window label for the info about the full start command.

data.name: DialogTitleSelectDestinationFolder
data.comment: The dialog title when selecting a destination folder.

data.name: MenuEncryptCopyFor
data.comment: The text in the menu to select files to encrypt a copy of a file to another recipient in a different destination folder, i.e. "Encrypt Copy...".

data.name: OpenFilesRemainMessage
data.value: File(s) couldn't be closed and remain open!
data.comment: A warning/info message stating that an attempt to close all files did not succeed completely and at least one file remain open.

data.name: DialogTextOrphanedDocumentsFiles
data.comment: A warning message at program exit. A new line separated list of these filesmay be appended.

data.name: DialogTitleSelectFilesToWipe
data.comment: The title of a file selection dialog for selecting files to wipe, i.e. 'Select files to wipe'.

data.name: MenuWipe
data.comment: The menu text to open a dialog asking for files to wipe.

data.name: MessageTextConfirmWipe
data.comment: A text asking a yes/no response confirmation for a dangerous irreversible operation, i.e. File Wipe.

data.name: DialogTextPasteOnlyTitle
data.comment: Text for the middle of the window, where files can be (only) pasted, as some OS's don't support drag and drop.

data.name: DialogTextPasteOnlyToolTip
data.value: Paste files here to encrypt or decrypt them. Use keyboard {0} to decrypt a single file, otherwise it opens.
data.comment: The tooltip for the paste (only) area, giving a little bit more information. Not all OS's support drag and drop.

data.name: DialogValidationAlreadySignedIn
data.value: You are already signed in. Look for the app behind another window, on another screen, among minimized apps or in the system tray and show the window from there.
data.comment: An error text displayed when an attempt is made to sign in twice with the same profile email.

data.name: HeadingCreateNewUser
data.comment: A heading in the create new user window, i.e. "Create New User".

data.name: MenuCreateUser
data.comment: The text in the menu to open a dialog to create a new user, i.e. "Create New...". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: MenuUser
data.comment: The text in the menu to open the User submenu, i.e. "User". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: MenuOpenRecent
data.comment: The text in the menu to display a list of recent files to open, i.e. "Open Recent...". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: ButtonGo
data.comment: The button prompt for windows offering to open a web browser.

data.name: FeatureNotFreeInformation
data.value:
Standard encryption and decryption is of course always free!
If you like the program and would like to enable all features, please support us by purchasing a subscription at {0}.
It's not free, but it's not expensive either and totally worth it we think!
data.comment: The info text show when the user attempts to use a non-free feature.

data.name: FeatureNotFreeTitle
data.comment: The title of the text box to show when the user attempts to use a non-free feature. {0} is the program name, and should always be first in all translations.

data.name: DialogSavePasswordPermanently
data.comment: A text next to a check box, indicating whether an added password should be saved permanently for use, or just for this session.

data.name: MenuEncryptCopy
data.comment: The text in the menu to select files to encrypt a copy of a file in a different destination folder, i.e. "Encrypt Copy...".

data.name: DialogTextWrongPasswordOpen
data.value: The file could not be opened. Try decrypting with an alternative password first.
data.comment: Text displayed when an attempt to open a file for editing fails due to wrong password, hinting that perhaps it has to be decrypted first using an alternative password.

data.name: UpdateCheckInformation
data.value: Would you like to check if there's an update available?
data.comment: The information text in the message box displayed when it's time to check for updates.

data.name: UpdateCheckTitle
data.comment: The title of the message box displayed when it's time to check for updates.

data.name: MenuChangePassword
data.comment: The text in the menu to open a dialog to change the password, i.e. "Change _Password...". (_ indicates keyboard accelerator)

data.name: WatermarkCurrentPassword
data.comment: The text used as watermark (slightly transparent grey) in a current password entry text box when changing password, i.e. "Current Password".

data.name: WatermarkNewPassword
data.comment: The text used as watermark (slightly transparent grey) in a new password entry text box when changing password, i.e. "New Password".

data.name: DialogTextFileDoesNotExist
data.value: File(s) do not exist, the action was canceled.
data.comment: An error message displayed when encrypting, decrypting or wiping could not proceed because one or more files simply were not not found and the operation is canceled. A list of files may be appended.

data.name: DialogTextInsufficientRights
data.value: File(s) are read-only, the destination directory is not writeable or you do not have sufficient permissions. The action was canceled.
data.comment: An error message displayed when encrypting, decrypting or wiping could not proceed because one or more files were read-only or the user does not have sufficient permissions and the operation is canceled. A list of files may be appended.

data.name: DialogTextSystemProtected
data.value: File(s) are system protected, the action was canceled.
data.comment: A message displayed when an attempt is made to encrypt or wipe a file located in a system protected location. It may be followed by a list of affected files. This will abort the entire operation and nothing happens.

data.name: DialogTextRelatedAccess
data.value: File(s) require sandbox folder access to encrypt, decrypt, wipe or rename. The action was canceled. See {0}.
data.comment: A message displayed when an attempt is made to encrypt, decrypt, rename or wipe a file where sandboxing prevents creating a related sibling file. {0} is a help page URL. It may be followed by a list of affected file names only. This will abort the entire operation and nothing happens.

data.name: MessageTextConfirmManyFilesFormat
data.comment: A warning when the number of files requested for an operation is higher than a threshold. {0} will be filled with the exact number of files.

data.name: DialogTitleSelectFolder
data.comment: A title for a generic select folder picker, used for both encrypt and decrypt folder etc.

data.name: MenuDecryptFolder
data.comment: A menu entry for the decrypt folder operation.

data.name: MenuEncryptFolder
data.comment: A menu entry for the encrypt folder operation.

data.name: DialogTitleFetchLicense
data.comment: Dialog title of the dialog where a user can request a purchased license using an email and the last 4 digits of the card used.

data.name: LabelLast4
data.value: Last 4 digits of credit card, or empty.
data.comment: A label displayed for the last 4 digits input field.

data.name: WatermarkLast4
data.comment: The watermark prompt for the last 4 digits to enter.

data.name: GetLicenseTooltip
data.value: A browser window will open. Copy the license from there, return here and paste it.
data.comment: A tooltip text explaining how getting the license works.

data.name: MenuBuyNow
data.comment: The menu text for a link to the purchase page.

data.name: MenuDownload
data.comment: The menu text for a link to the download page.

data.name: MenuLicense
data.comment: The menu text for the function to retrieve a purchased license.

data.name: FilesProcessedMessageFormat
data.comment: The progress finished indicator. The {0} is replaced by the number of files, 0, 1 or many.

data.name: TipMoreHelp
data.comment: An additional prompt informing that more information is available with a click. It may be added to help button and other tool tips at the end as a last sentence.

data.name: ToolTipAddPassword
data.value: Adding a password is only for decryption, when you receive files from someone else or you have used another password previously. It does not affect encryption.
data.comment: Tooltip for the Add Password dialog, explaining a litte more.

data.name: ToolTipSignIn
data.value: Signing in ensures you are using the correct password for encryption, and that you don't need to retype the password each time. This is the master password for all encryption. The sign in is only local to the app.
data.comment: Tooltip for the sign in dialog, explaining the reason.

data.name: ButtonFree
data.comment: The label for the hide Premium features button.

data.name: ButtonPremium
data.comment: The label for the show Premium features button.

data.name: ToolTipHidePremium
data.value: Hide premium features unavailable in the free version.
data.comment: A tooltip describing that a clicking a button hides the menus and buttons for premium when in free version.

data.name: ToolTipShowPremium
data.comment: A tooltip describing that clicking a button shows the menus and buttons for premium even when in free version.

data.name: LabelDecryptionPasswordCountFormat
data.value: There are no saved passwords to clear.|There is one saved password. Clear it?|There are {0} passwords saved. Clear them all?
data.comment: The text label describing the action for the clear passwords dialog. The {0} will be replaced by a number. This is a plural text, the first is for zero, then one, and then 2 or more separated by '|'.

data.name: MenuClearPasswords
data.comment: Menu title for the clear passwords function. Also used as the title of the dialog, edited to remove "..." and accelerators

data.name: ToolTipClearPasswords
data.value: Clear decryption passwords saved in settings. You can always add them back again.
data.comment: Tooltip for the clear passwords dialog.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyDisable
data.value: Do you want to remove the YubiKey configuration?
data.comment: Dialog title for the YubiKey disabling setup dialog.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyEnable
data.value: Do you want to enable this YubiKey for signing in?
data.comment: Dialog title for the YubiKey enabling setup dialog.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyLooking
data.comment: Dialog title displayed when we're checking for a YubiKey during setup

data.name: DialogYubiKeyNotConnected
data.comment: Dialog title for the YubiKey setup dialog when there is no yubikey connected and no configuration.

data.name: MenuYubiKey
data.comment: Menu title for configuration of a YubiKey.

data.name: ToolTipYubiKeySetup
data.value: Enable or disable the use of a YubiKey for sign in. Use the Yubico Authenticator or other utilities to reset, change and inspect the YubiKey PIV configuration in more detail.
data.comment: The tool tip for the help button in the YubiKey setup dialog.

data.name: DialogInputValidationError
data.value: The value is not in the correct format!
data.comment: An error message when an input value is not in the expected format.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyEnterKeyTitle
data.value: Please enter YubiKey PIV hex management key:
data.comment: A dialog title used when asking for PIV management key authentication

data.name: DialogYubiKeyEnterPinTitle
data.comment: A dialog title used when asking for the PIN

data.name: DialogYubiKeyManagementKeyDefault
data.value: The PIV management key has it's default value 3 x 0102030405060708, it should be changed!
data.comment: A warning message stating that the PIV management key still has it's default value.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyMissingFeatures
data.value: Required features are missing from this YubiKey.
data.comment: An error message displayed when a non-conforming YubiKey is connected.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyNotInitialized
data.value: This YubiKey is not yet initialized for use.
data.comment: An informational message displayed when the connected YubiKey is not initialized.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyNotSupported
data.comment: A title dialog text displayed when a YubiKey is detected, but it doesn't have sufficient capabilities.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyOnlyTouch
data.value: Only this YubiKey and a touch is required to sign in.
data.comment: An info message stating that it's enough to touch the YubiKey to sign in.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyPinDefault
data.value: The PIV PIN has it's default value 123456, it should be changed!
data.comment: A warning message saying that the PIV PIN still has it's default value.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyPinRequired
data.value: This YubiKey and the PIN is required to sign in.
data.comment: An info message stating that the PIN is required to sign in.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyPivSlotUsedFormat
data.value: PIV slot {0} is currently used or possible to use.
data.comment: An informational message displayed about what slot will be used. '{0}' will be filled with the actual slot in question.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyTouchPrompt
data.comment: A modal disappearing prompt to touch the YubiKey when required.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyOpenSecurity
data.value: Only this YubiKey is required to sign in.
data.comment: A description of how the Open security mode works.

data.name: DialogYubiKeySelectMode
data.value: Select how you want to use your YubiKey.
data.comment: A sub-title in the dialog above a list of radio buttons where a choice of the security mode is made.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyPukDefault
data.value: The PIV PUK has it's default value 12345678, it should be changed!
data.comment: A warning message stating that the PIV PUK still has it's default value.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyEnabledFailed
data.value: It is not possible to use this YubiKey. There may not be any slots available.
data.comment: Error message when enabling fails, typically because there are no slots.

data.name: DialogLabelAppSettingsDirectory
data.comment: A label in the about box for the directory where all settings are stored.

data.name: MenuRandomRename
data.comment: The menu text for the random renaming of files.

data.name: ExpirationCheckWarning
data.value: Your license has expired. Do you want to download an updated license?
data.comment: The text in a message box informing the user that the license is expired, and asking if the user wants to download an update.

data.name: ToolTipGetLicense
data.value: When your subscription license has expired, or you are using a new device, you must fetch a license from the server. Provide the information here and follow the instructions.
data.comment: A tool tip for the get license dialog which using the user name and the last 4 digits, will open a browser page with the license if found.

data.name: DownloadFreeTrialQuestion
data.value: Would you like to try premium free for 3 days? No credit card required.
data.comment: A dialog box text, asking the user if (s)he wants to download a free premium trial license.

data.name: MenuTrialDownload
data.comment: A menu entry to request a temporary trial license.

data.name: ButtonRetry
data.comment: A button to retry something.

data.name: MenuSuggestPassword
data.comment: Menu entry that opens a dialog box with suggestions for passwords

data.name: ButtonCopy
data.comment: A button to copy something to the clipboard

data.name: ToolTipCopySuggested
data.value: Copy the suggested password and close the dialog.
data.comment: A tool tip shown when hovering over the copy button in the suggest password dialog.

data.name: ToolTipSuggestMasterPassword
data.comment: A tool tip for the suggest a password for create new user or change password.

data.name: ToolTipShowPassword
data.comment: A tooltip for the show password button in password dialogs

data.name: ToolTipHidePassword
data.comment: A tooltip for the hide password buton in password dialogs

data.name: ButtonReset
data.comment: A button to initiate an emergency password reset.

data.name: ToolTipEmergencyReset
data.value: Set a new master password. Warning! The old password is still needed to decrypt previously encrypted files!
data.comment: A tool tip for the emergency reset, warning that old files still need the old password.

data.name: HeadingEmergencyReset
data.comment: The heading for the emergency reset password dialog

data.name: MenuClearRecent
data.comment: The menu item to clear the recent files list

data.name: MenuEncryptDecryptText
data.comment: The menu item to encrypt or decrypt text

data.name: ToolTipEncryptDecryptText
data.value: Write or copy/paste text to encrypt or decrypt. The password will be used to encrypt or decrypt the text, and should be shared in a separate channel between the sender and recipient. Always include the BEGIN header and the END footer with the encrypted text.
data.comment: A tooltip for the text encryption feature

data.name: MessageFileFormatError
data.value: The encrypted data is not correctly formatted.
data.comment: Error message when decryption fails due to broken data.

data.name: WatermarkPasswordShare
data.comment: A watermark for entering sharing passwords

data.name: DialogTextCliApiVersionError
data.value: Incompatible Xecrets Cli found at '{0}' with API version {1}, but version {2}.[>={3}] is required.\n\nUpdate Xecrets Cli, or remove it and use the one included in the app.
data.comment: Error message for incompatible Cli API. {0} is the full path to the Cli Tool, {1} is the Cli Tool API version, {2} is the SDK API Major version, and {3} is the minor version.

data.name: ExpirationCheckPurchaseWarning
data.value: Your free trial license has expired. Do you want to view the subscription information web page?
data.comment: A warning message displayed when a free, non-purchased, license has expired.

data.name: MessageTextForgotPassword
data.comment: A short text shown as a hyperlink in the sign in dialog.

data.name: DialogTitleSelectFilesToReEncrypt
data.comment: This is the title for the open dialog to select files to re-encrypt

data.name: MenuReEncryptFiles
data.comment: Menu entry for re-encrypting already encrypted files.

data.name: MenuReEncryptFolder
data.comment: The menu entry to select a folder and re-encrypt all files in it and subfolders

data.name: FilesCanceledMessage
data.comment: A message displayed as user feedback when an operation was canceled.

data.name: OperationCanceledFormat
data.value: Operation was canceled during processing of '{0}'. Check and verify!
data.comment: A message displayed when a multi-file operation was canceled, {0} is the full name of the file that was interrupted.

data.name: ToolTipGetLicenseNoCard
data.value: Leave the last 4 digits empty if you didn't use a card or don't recall them.
data.comment: An additional tooltip part, that explains that if no card was entered, getting the license this way won't work so easily.

data.name: MenuPreferences
data.comment: A menu entry to further options to change preferences.

data.name: MenuTheme
data.comment: A menu entry to further options to change the visual theme, i.e. dark or light.

data.name: ThemeDark
data.comment: A menu entry or label to select a dark visual theme.

data.name: ThemeLight
data.comment: A menu entry or label to select a light visual theme.

data.name: ThemeSystem
data.comment: A menu entry or lablel to select the visual theme to match the system theme.

data.name: MenuInactivityExit
data.comment: A menu entry for selecting an inactivty timeout exit

data.name: MenuInactivityNever
data.comment: A menu entry for selecting 'Never' as the choice for inactivity timeout

data.name: MenuInactivityTimeoutValueFormat
data.comment: The format for a timeout selection menu entry.

data.name: ButtonLicense
data.comment: A label for a button to paste the license

data.name: MenuClipboardLicense
data.comment: A menu text, also used as tooltip for license paste button

data.name: DecryptionPasswordsAboutFormat
data.comment: A text in the about box, telling how many decryption passwords are known.

data.name: DialogTextPrivateKeysImported
data.value: We found and imported account keys from AxCrypt. You may still need to provide the original password a file was encrypted with if the AxCrypt password was reset, changed or is different from the Xecrets Ez password.
data.comment: A pop-up message displayed after importing AxCrypt account keys.

data.name: PrivateKeysAboutFormat
data.comment: A text in the about box, telling how many private keys there are available. It will not be displayed if there are none at all.

data.name: MenuCustomerPortal
data.comment: The menu to open the customer portal

data.name: MenuHelpVideos
data.comment: The menu to open a gallery of video instructions

data.name: MessageTextBadLicenseString
data.value: The license key is not in the correct format.
data.comment: Error message when an improperly formatted license string is attempted to be used.

data.name: MessageTextConfirmPasteDirectory
data.comment: A confirmation message prompt when pasting a directory.

data.name: ConfirmationQuestion
data.comment: Appeneded after a statement, in a confirmation dialog.

data.name: DontShowAgain
data.comment: Label for a checkbox to optionally hide a specific warning or other message.

data.name: MenuClearDontShowAgain
data.comment: A menu entry to clear previously hidden warnings

data.name: MenuChangeEmail
data.comment: The text used as a title in the change email dialog and the menu

data.name: MixedFilesWarning
data.value: Both encrypted and plain files are included. The plain files will be encrypted, and the already encrypted will be unchanged.
data.comment: A warning message displayed when an operation includes both encrypted an unencrypted files.

data.name: MessageNotEncrypted
data.value: The initial 16 bytes are wrong, it is probably some other kind of data or severely damaged.
data.comment: A message when decrypting a file that does not start with the magic guid.

data.name: MessageZeroLength
data.value: The data is damaged, the length is zero bytes.
data.comment: A message when decrypting a file or text with exactly zero bytes. It is followed by one or more file names.

data.name: DialogLabelRealStartFolder
data.comment: A label in the about box, for the real user-visible start folder, before the OS maybe moved it.

data.name: DialogTextExpiresSoonInfoFormat
data.value: Your premium license will expire on {0}. To keep using premium features, please renew your license in the app after it expires.
data.comment: An informational message when a license is about to expire.

data.name: DialogTextRemovableDriveFirstWarning
data.value: Settings and temp files will be stored on a removable drive, not your main drive. Continue?
data.comment: A warning text when a removable drive is first used, information that all settings etc will be stored on it.

data.name: DialogTextRemovableDriveUnplugWarning
data.value: Before unplugging it, make sure to exit the app and eject the drive safely to avoid data loss.
data.comment: A warning text informing that a removable drive must be unplugged safely when running from it.

data.name: DialogTitleRemovableDrive
data.comment: A title for dialogs warning about the situation where we're running from a removable drive.

data.name: ZeroLengthWarning
data.value: One or more selected files are empty. They might be damaged.
data.comment: A warning text, stating that one or more files are zero length, asking if the user is sure. The text should be followed by ConfirmationQuestion. It's followed by a list of the files that are detected as zero length.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyChangeConfiguration
data.value: To change the YubiKey configuration, you must first remove the existing configuration.
data.comment: An information message giving a hint that to change the configuration, you first need to remove the current configuration.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyDefaultChangeInfo
data.value: To change the PIN, PUK, or Management Key, get the Yubico Authenticator app and go to Certificates settings. For details, click the help icon.
data.comment: An information message giving hints on how to change YubiKey defaults, and referring to help for more info where actual links etc are.

data.name: ButtonCopyAll
data.comment: Button text for a "Copy All" button.

data.name: ButtonSaveAs
data.comment: Button text for a "Save As..." button.

data.name: ErrorCombiningShares
data.value: The shares could not be combined. Please check the shares and try again.
data.comment: An error text when shares can't be combined either because they are mismatched, or in the wrong format.

data.name: ErrorDuplicatesRemoved
data.comment: An error text when duplicate shares were entered and removed.

data.name: LabelTheSecret
data.comment: A label for the textbox where a recovered secret is displayed.

data.name: MenuCombineShares
data.comment: Menu text for combining secret shares to recover the secret.

data.name: MenuCreateShares
data.comment: Menu text for creating secret shares.

data.name: MenuLoadShares
data.comment: Menu text for loading/viewing secret shares.

data.name: PromptEnterFirstShare
data.comment: A prompt to enter a share (the first share) to combine.

data.name: PromptEnterRemainingShares
data.comment: A prompt to enter the remaining shares to combine.

data.name: PromptRequiredShares
data.comment: Prompt for the required shares.

data.name: PromptTotalShares
data.comment: Prompt for the total number of shares.

data.name: SelectShareAny
data.comment: Radio button text to share any arbitrary secret.

data.name: SelectShareSignIn
data.comment: Radio button text to share the sign in password.

data.name: ToolTipCombineShares
data.value: Enter the required number of shares to combine them and view the secret.
data.comment: Help tool tip for the combine shares dialog. It should be followed by a "Click for more info...." prompt, leading to a help page.

data.name: ToolTipCreateShares
data.value: Split a secret into shares, specifying how many shares and how many are required to recover the secret.
data.comment: Help tool tip for the create shares dialog. It should be followed by a "Click for more info.." prompt, leading to a help page.

data.name: ToolTipViewShares
data.value: View previously created shares, and send or save them to different places.
data.comment: Tooltip for the view shares dialog. Should be followed by a "Click for more info..." prompt, leading to the help page.

data.name: ViewSharesDescriptionFormat
data.value: Save or distribute these shares to different people or places. At least {0} shares are required to recover the secret.
data.comment: The explanatory text in the view shares dialog. {0} refers to the threshold, or number of shares required.

data.name: WatermarkPasswordSecret
data.comment: Watermark text for password or secret entry to share.

data.name: FeatureNotFreeShortInformation
data.value: Sorry, this premium feature is not available in the free version.
data.comment: The first short text specifying a feature is not free.

data.name: FeatureNotFreeHideQuestion
data.value: Do you want to hide all premium features?
data.comment: The question asked when an attempt is made to use a premium feature in the free version.

data.name: ReleaseNotesInformation
data.value: You're running a new version! Would you like to see the release notes?
data.comment: An information question yes/no dialog text asking if the user wants to see the release notes.

data.name: RequestReviewQuestion
data.value: Please help us by reviewing and rating the app!
data.comment: A pop-up asking for reviews. It should have OK and Cancel, and OK leads to a web page being opened.

data.name: DialogTextEnterLicense
data.comment: The title of the dialog to enter or paste a license string

data.name: WatermarkEnterLicenseHere
data.comment: A watermark helping guide users where to paste the license string

data.name: MenuEnterLicense
data.comment: The menu entry for opening a window where the license can be pasted.

data.name: DialogInstructionEnterLicenseFormat
data.value: Copy the license key from our license page (the link looks like {1}/license?s=2Rl7q1Gr…), then return here. If you already have the link, open it in your browser now. Otherwise, visit {0} and follow the instructions to get the correct link.
data.comment: A longer explanation of how to get and enter a license. {0} is replaced by the URL of the customer portal page.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyServiceUnsupported
data.value: This app can’t use a YubiKey on this operating system.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyPcscMissing
data.value: Please ensure that pcscd / pcsc-lite is installed and the daemon is running. Click the help icon for more information about YubiKey and Linux.

data.name: DialogYubiKeyRedistributableMissing
data.value: To use YubiKey, the Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable must be installed. Download it from {0}, run the installer, and restart the application.
data.comment: A warning message stating that the VC++ redistributable is missing, and providing a link to download it.

data.name: CliVersionMismatchWarning
data.value:
Warning! Version {0} of Xecrets Cli found at '{1}' does not match the version {2} of Xecrets Ez. This is not recommended since it may cause problems.
Would you like to view a help page with more information?
data.comment: A warning shown when the discovered Cli version does not exactly match Ez. {0} is Cli version, {1} is full Cli path, {2} is Ez version.
